_comment: Image Manager/Archive STORE endpoints for the WG-26 2026 Connectathon, parsed from docs/2026Connectathon_Network_ConfigurationSummary.xlsx (as of 2026-07-03). store_scp = DIMSE C-STORE SCP; stow_url = full DICOMweb STOW target (studies resource). Verify against the live spreadsheet before each submission — endpoints change during the event. Our calling AE title / source IP may need pre-registration with each archive: coordinate with the project manager.

sectra.name: Sectra ImIT
sectra.whitelist: source IP whitelisting required (DIMSE and DICOMweb)
sectra.notes: Accepting SM and ANN since 2026-06-12. STOW is plain HTTP on :5013 with Basic Auth; obtain the username/password from the Sectra contact and export them as WG26_STOW_USER / WG26_STOW_PASSWORD (do NOT commit them). Send source IP to the contact for whitelisting.

google.name: Google Healthcare API (via import adapter)
google.notes: Per docs/archives Google doc: the connectathon proxy removes the OAuth requirement, so DICOMweb + DIMSE are open. Storage commitment supported. Overwriting an existing instance via STOW FAILS - delete your own instances first to replace.

proscia.name: Proscia
proscia.whitelist: DIMSE: our AE Title + callback host/IP/port must be whitelisted. Basic DICOMweb store needs no auth; OIDC endpoints optional.
proscia.notes: QIDO needs at least PatientID=*; accepts DICOM keyword tags only (not hex).

agfa.name: AGFA HealthCare
agfa.whitelist: external IP(s) + AET must be whitelisted (required). Email the contact.
agfa.notes: C-STORE only for storing (no STOW). DICOMweb is QIDO/WADO only, HTTPS + Keycloak bearer token, needs FQDN ei-service.med.agfa.be DNS resolution. Per docs/archives AGFA doc.

visage.name: Visage Imaging
visage.notes: Store: C-STORE only (STOW URL was a placeholder 'url string' in the config; DIMSE store port 2010 is OPEN - C-ECHO+C-STORE with AET IDC accepted 2026-07-05, no whitelisting). Verify: QIDO-RS base is https://35.238.112.229/wado (probed 2026-07-05: /wado/studies -> 401 WWW-Authenticate: Bearer, application/dicom+json), needs a JWT (export WG26_BEARER_TOKEN) and --insecure (cert is for the hostname, not the bare IP). Interop caveat: the Store SCP refuses the JPEG 2000 presentation context for VL WSI (accepts Little Endian Explicit only).
